problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Combining Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
